description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are finished in white brick, and large glass windows and sliding doors dominate the facades, allowing ample natural light inside. The front features a small landscaped garden with trees and shrubs, while the rear and sides have minimal outdoor detailing. The interior is open-plan, with visible living, kitchen, and bedroom areas, and contemporary furnishings. Wooden accents, such as shutters and decking, add warmth to the otherwise minimalist design. The property includes a small patio area and appears to have a compact, efficient footprint suitable for urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story white brick bungalow with large glass windows, flat roof, and landscaped front garden. Features open-plan interiors and wooden accents.
description_view_0: Shows the side with the main entrance, large windows, and a landscaped garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Displays the rear facade with grouped windows and a clear view of the garden extending along the side.
description_view_2: Highlights the opposite side with a large glass door and minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_3: Presents the front facade with sliding glass doors, wooden shutters, and a small patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
